case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. JOSE OVIDIO OLIVARES PARADA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PARADA, JOSE OVIDIO OLIVARES $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $145.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,645.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-27-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-27-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE NANCY ANGEL, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST AT OPORTUN, INC. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT JOSE OVIDIO OLIVARES PARADA. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $45.00 - SERVED AUG-08-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PARADA, JOSE OVIDIO OLIVARES
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT PARADA, JOSE OVIDIO OLIVARES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-27-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-27-2016 - JUDGMENT.
